case_title: A & A LEGAL SERVICE, INC, VS. GEORGE WOLFF ESQ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,213.92 FILED BY A & A LEGAL SERVICE, INC, AS TO DEFENDANT WOLFF ESQ, GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF A & A LEGAL SERVICE, INC,
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF A & A LEGAL SERVICE, INC, AS TO DEFENDANT WOLFF ESQ, GEORGE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2019 - JUDGMENT.
AFFIDAVIT OF IDENTITY (AND PROPOSED ORDER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF A & A LEGAL SERVICE, INC,

ORDER ON PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR ORDER ON AFFIDAVIT OF IDENTITY. THE REQUEST IS DENIED. THE AFFIDAVIT SUBMITTED IN SUPPORT OF THE REQUEST 1) FAILS TO MEET THE REQUIREMENTS OF CCP 680.135; 2) FAILS TO STATE FACTS RELIED ON IN ITS ASSERTIONS, AND 3) FAILS TO IDENTIFY WHETHER THE BUSINESS NAMES LISTED FOR APPROVAL ARE NAMES OF CORPORATE ENTITIES OR OTHER TYPES. PURSUANT TO CCP 680.135 C0RPORATE ENTITIES CAN NOT BE ADDED AS AN ALIAS TO THE NAMES OF A JUDGMENT DEBTOR WHO IS A NATURAL PERSON WITHOUT AN ORDER AMENDING THE JUDGMENT OR ISSUING OF AN AMENDED JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED APR-11-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WOLFF ESQ, GEORGE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF A & A LEGAL SERVICE, INC, RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOLFF ESQ, GEORGE $2,132.41 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,222.41 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AFFIDAVIT OF IDENTITY (AND PROPOSED ORDER) - RESUBMITTED - (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF A & A LEGAL SERVICE, INC,

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF A & A LEGAL SERVICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ROBERTA ANDERSON. DEFENDANT GEORGE WOLFF ESQ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER ON "AFFIDAVIT OF IDENTITY" DENIED. *SEE ENCLOSED REJECTION NOTICE*
